goal: Add vendor/get-anything-done/.husky/pre-commit (or equivalent) that runs 'gad self build && gad self install' only if src is newer than installed exe. Staleness check via git diff --quiet bin/ lib/ scripts/ against the commit SHA embedded in installed exe (task 66-06). Skippable via GAD_NO_PRECOMMIT_BUILD=1. Idempotent: running twice in a row produces no work the second time.
